task_text:

content.text:
Based on the data in **invoices.csv**, here are the results:

📋 **Invoices with Amount Owed Greater Than $200**

There are **2 invoices** that meet this criteria:

| # | Customer | Email | Amount Owed | Due Date |
|---|----------|-------|-------------|----------|
| 1 | Marcus Webb | marcus.webb@example.com | $220.00 | 2026-05-28 |
| 2 | Tyler Brooks | tyler.brooks@example.com | $340.25 | 2026-05-15 |

The remaining 3 customers (Jordan Ellis at $150.00, Priya Nair at $75.50, and Sofia Reyes at $0.00) all fall at or below the $200 threshold.
